wiki.summary: “Rah Tah Tah” is one of the few songs teased in a CHROMAKOPIA promotional video, uploaded to Tyler’s channel on October 22, 2024, where a 12-second part of the song was featured in a medley of different CHROMAKOPIA snippets. This track portrays the chaotic side of the album, featuring Tyler’s well-known aggressive rapping style, with the production following suit and sounding just as menacing. +28 Read more on Last.fm.
